title: 5 Local Marketing Mistakes Every Agency Makes (And How to Fix Them)
description: These five local marketing mistakes cost agencies clients and revenue every year. Here's how to spot them — and fix them — before they become a problem.

title: How to Use Campaignly's Audit Tool to Find Campaign Gaps
description: A walkthrough of Campaignly's audit tool — what it checks, how to interpret results, and how to prioritize fixes for your clients.

title: How to Set Realistic Marketing Goals for Local Business Clients
description: Setting the wrong goals is the fastest way to lose a client. Here's how to define targets that are honest, measurable, and achievable.

title: The Agency's Guide to Google Ads Reporting
description: What to include in Google Ads reports, how to frame performance for non-technical clients, and which metrics actually matter.

title: Why Your GA4 Numbers Don't Match Google Ads (And What to Do About It)
description: Attribution models, conversion windows, and session counting all contribute to the mismatch. Here's how to explain it to clients and fix it.

title: How to Present Marketing Results to Non-Technical Clients
description: Translating ad metrics into language that resonates with business owners — what to show, what to skip, and how to frame performance.

title: Local SEO Checklist for New Campaigns
description: The 12 local SEO items to check before launching any campaign for a local business client. Audit this list once, save hours of troubleshooting later.

title: Understanding the Difference Between Impressions, Clicks, and Conversions
description: A plain-English guide to the three most-cited ad metrics — what they measure, how they relate, and what a healthy ratio looks like.

title: How to Build a Marketing Proposal That Wins Local Business Clients
description: The structure, language, and specifics that turn a generic proposal into one that gets signed. Includes what most agencies leave out.

title: The Complete Guide to Google Business Profile for Agencies
description: Everything agencies need to know about managing Google Business Profiles for clients — setup, optimization, posts, reviews, and reporting.
